title: Diagnostic-only L0 Hybrid Retrieval Simulator — Manifest Diagnostics
objective: Add a read-only, per-request manifest diagnostics section to capture simulated hybrid L0 candidate metadata and scores without affecting prompts, selection, or indexes.
proposed_change: Introduce manifest.diagnostics.l0_retrieval_simulator with approved fields and constraints, including selection_effect fixed to "none" and optional reranker constrained to "none" or omitted. Provide a read-only deprecated compatibility alias at context_pack.selection_diagnostics.retrieval_candidates. Emit diagnostics only when explicitly requested; require explicit combine_policy and normalization configuration; enforce governance prohibitions through guardrail fields and tests.
rationale: Enables reproducible, read-only diagnostics aligned with context-manifest usage.
Keeps diagnostic retrieval scoring separate from context selection and provider prompts.
Prepares a later governed adapter or reranker evaluation slice without admitting behavior changes now.
Preserves the reconciled memory-loop direction while remaining diagnostic-only.
Follows COMP-0024/SYNCOMP-0015 max-model agreement on reranker and execution semantics.
constraints: No automatic L0 retrieval; inputs are simulated, externally provided, or read from explicitly read-only snapshots.
No context selection changes and no provider prompt inclusion.
No production embedding creation, external embedding API calls, vector index mutation, or document index mutation.
Reranking is deferred; reranker must be omitted or equal to "none".
No token budget enforcement or token budget telemetry.
No selection adapter integration in this slice.
No cross-namespace access, namespace ACL bypass, or redaction-boundary bypass.
No persistent write-back; diagnostics are per-request or ephemeral within the manifest only.
combine_policy and normalization require explicit configuration; no implicit defaults.
success_criteria: A schema or validator accepts manifest.diagnostics.l0_retrieval_simulator entries with the approved diagnostic fields.
All candidates have selection_effect equal to "none".
The optional reranker field accepts only "none"; omission is treated as "none".
Guardrail fields indicate zero side effects: side_effects_blocked true, writes_performed 0, index_mutations 0, embedding_creations 0.
Tests prove no provider prompt changes, no context selection changes, no production embedding or index writes, and no persistent write-back.
Self-model records and SELF_MODEL.json represent the slice as diagnostic-only.
risk: Diagnostic retrieval_score may be confused with actionable selection semantics unless the schema, tests, warrant, and docs keep selection_effect fixed to "none" and forbid prompt or selection effects.
next_action: Create a warrant for PLAN-20260706-0002 that explicitly forbids prompt inclusion, context selection changes, production embedding/index mutation, reranking beyond "none", token budget telemetry, selection adapter integration, cross-namespace/redaction bypass, and persistent write-back.
